description: Verified the mobile header navigation; found that the 'Blog' and 'Portfolio' links are swapped, leading to the wrong routes.

issues.name: Blog link in header has wrong route
issues.description: Expected: The "blog" link in the header should navigate to `/blog`. Actual: The "blog" link in the header navigates to `/portfolio`.
reproductionSteps: Navigate to http://localhost:3002 using a 375x812 viewport.
Look for the "blog" link in the header.
Observe its destination URL or click it.
issues.expectedBehavior: The "blog" link in the header should navigate to `/blog`.
issues.actualBehavior: The "blog" link in the header navigates to `/portfolio`.

issues.name: Portfolio link in header has wrong route
issues.description: Expected: The "portfolio" link in the header should navigate to `/portfolio`. Actual: The "portfolio" link in the header navigates to `/blog`.
reproductionSteps: Navigate to http://localhost:3002 using a 375x812 viewport.
Look for the "portfolio" link in the header.
Observe its destination URL or click it.
issues.expectedBehavior: The "portfolio" link in the header should navigate to `/portfolio`.
issues.actualBehavior: The "portfolio" link in the header navigates to `/blog`.
